Trained volunteers are matched with individuals and are background checked. 1036 NE 5th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 678-5483 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COUNCIL ON AGING OF CENTRAL OREGON CARING CONNECTIONS
